prompt: Add request ID middleware for HTTP tracing

turns.content:
<task>
Add a middleware that generates a unique request ID for each HTTP request and sets it in the response headers.
</task>

1	package middleware
   2	
   3	import "net/http"
   4	
   5	// Middleware is a function that wraps an http.Handler.
   6	type Middleware func(http.Handler) http.Handler
   7	
   8	// Chain applies middlewares in order.
   9	func Chain(h http.Handler, middlewares ...Middleware) http.Handler {
  10		for i := len(middlewares) - 1; i >= 0; i-- {
  11			h = middlewares[i](h)
  12		}
  13		return h
  14	}

arguments.summary: Read internal/middleware/middleware.go — Middleware type wrapping http.Handler, Chain() for composing. Need to create requestid.go that generates UUID and adds X-Request-ID header.

arguments.summary: Created internal/middleware/requestid.go. RequestID middleware generates 16-char hex ID using crypto/rand, sets X-Request-ID on both request and response. Preserves existing ID from upstream proxy. Found middleware dir via glob. All 3 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Added RequestID middleware in internal/middleware/requestid.go. Generates unique hex IDs, sets X-Request-ID header on request and response. Preserves upstream IDs. All 3 tests pass.
